summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Anka Healthcare CS Platform Phase 1 MVP. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend UI working with excellent navigation and AI integration. Minor dropdown interaction issue identified but not blocking core functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Shadcn/Radix Select component has overlay interception preventing option selection

passed_tests: Client cards display and click navigation
Client detail page with all tabs
Add new client dialog and form submission
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix the Select dropdown component overlay interception issue in the Add Contact form. Consider using a different approach for the role selection dropdown or add proper click handling to bypass the overlay.
